auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

onboarding.welcomeTag: Daily pre-market educational analysis for US-market tickers.
onboarding.welcomeBody: Study potential setups with entry, stop-loss and target levels, sized to your capital. Everything here is educational — never advice.
onboarding.ageBody: You must be 18 years or older to use AI4Trade Signals.
onboarding.ageConfirmLabel: I confirm I am 18 years of age or older
onboarding.ageTooYoung: You must be 18 or older to use this app.
onboarding.capitalBody: We use this only to illustrate position sizing. It is stored on your device and on your account.
onboarding.riskIntro: Please read carefully. You must accept all three to continue.
onboarding.riskP1: Trading and investing in financial instruments carries a high level of risk and may not be suitable for everyone. You can lose some or all of your capital.
onboarding.riskP2: All signals, analyses and illustrations in this app are educational content produced by an automated algorithm. They are not personalised investment advice, a recommendation, or a solicitation to transact.
onboarding.riskP3: Past performance and illustrative setups do not indicate future results. No outcome is promised or implied.
onboarding.riskP4: You alone are responsible for your own decisions. Consider seeking independent, licensed financial advice before acting.
onboarding.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the <1>Terms of Service</1>
onboarding.acceptPrivacy: I have read and accept the <1>Privacy Policy</1>
onboarding.acceptRisk: I have read and understood the <1>Risk Disclosure</1> and confirm I am 18 years or older
onboarding.acceptanceError: We couldn't record your acceptance. Please check your connection and try again.
onboarding.notifBody: Get a pre-market reminder when new educational setups are published. You can change this anytime in Settings.

signals.empty: No signals published yet today. Check back before the US market open.
